chunks.text: Information for Current Students - EECS at Berkeley Information for Current Students Know your rights! It’s important to know your rights if you’re ever approached by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). Stay informed and prepared— visit our resources page for more information . Graduate Students Information for Graduate Students New Graduate Student Guide Department Resources Student Computing and Email Facilities, Safety & Space Cory & Soda Hall building safety, space & maintenance, and department vehicle information. Administrative Services Lost and Found, mail, and shipping/receiving. For faculty office hours, see their EECS homepage. Center for Student Affairs Individual academic and administrative assistance for all EECS students. EECS Commencement Undergraduate Students Advice and support, degree requirements, sample study plans, declaring and changing majors and minors, commencement, research opportunities, special programs (honors, study abroad, etc.) Information for Undergraduates EECS Major CS Major ECE Major Undergraduate Research EECS Study Abroad Program General Course Schedules and Information Curricular Practical Training (CPT) In Times of Stress Department Policy on Academic Dishonesty Student Concerns and Grievances Contacts for grievances and sexual harassment. Student Organizations Student Awards Winners, descriptions, and nominations. Resources for Underrepresented Students ASEs (Academic Student Employees) Information for ASEs (TAs, UCS2s, Readers, Tutors, & UCS1s) Prospective ASEs Applications, deadlines, selection process. Current ASEs Time sheets, payroll FAQs, financial information, course resources Resources for TAs and UCS2s Resource guide for course staff (GSIs/UCS2s/Readers/UCS1s/TAs) to answer questions and help them navigate their responsibilities.
